summary: Promoted from MPI-64 at epic close — RunPod UX polish + fresh-volume init (F4/L3/L4/L5/G1/G2/G4/G6).

note: G2 REVISIT (user feedback 2026-06-15): the Stopping toast (Stopping… the remote engine is interrupting the current step) is UNWANTED on a USER-initiated stop — stopping a generation should NOT trigger a toast at all. G2 originally specced ADDING a Stopping toast for the ~5s Stop->interrupt gap; user now says it is noise. DECISION NEEDED: either drop the toast on user-initiated stop entirely, or make it much quieter/shorter. App-side, no rebuild. Surfaced while live-testing the MPI-81 remote ComfyUI restart (user start+stopped a T2V gen to confirm ComfyUI was running before installing I2V).

summary: G2 RESOLVED = REVERTED (decision: drop toast entirely). Removed the Stopping… toast from ComfyUIController.interrupt() — user-initiated Stop should not toast; interrupt() is only ever the user-Stop path. Commit b425fa1. comfyController.js was uncommitted-clean at edit time (MPI-92's earlier in-flight hunks already gone), staged whole-file, eslint clean. G2 net result: no toast. Original 'add a toast' spec closed won't-do.
